name: kalshi-pp-mcp
description: Kalshi Trade Manual API surface as MCP tools.

kalshi_api_key.title: KALSHI_API_KEY
kalshi_api_key.description: Kalshi access key id (from kalshi.com account settings). Requests are RSA-PSS signed with the private key below.

kalshi_private_key_path.title: KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
kalshi_private_key_path.description: Filesystem path to the RSA private key (.pem) that pairs with the access key id.
